body.title: Create /recall skill — CC-side interface to uurecall
body.result: /recall skill created at ~/.claude/skills/recall/SKILL.md; backed by uurecall.py with graceful degradation
body.intention: I intend that /recall is a usable CC skill backed by the uurecall.py script that already exists.
body.description:
uurecall.py and ~/bin/uurecall exist and work. No skill file exists so /recall is unavailable inside Claude Code sessions. This ticket creates the SKILL.md.

The skill should: (1) accept a query string as args, (2) call uurecall.py via Bash with those args, (3) surface results inline. If no results, say so cleanly. Should gracefully degrade when librarian/embedding pipeline is offline.

**Affected files:** ~/.claude/skills/recall/SKILL.md (new)
**Design rules:** none
**Scope boundary:** IN — skill file only. OUT — changes to uurecall.py or the underlying search pipeline.
**Completion criteria:** /recall <query> runs in a CC session and returns results from the recall script; graceful message when offline.
